home.seoDescription: Organize your tasks simply and effectively with Atom Chat.
home.heroSubtitle: Manage your tasks and categories clearly, quickly, and without complications.
home.featuresSubtitle: Simple and powerful tools to keep your productivity at its best.
home.featureTasksDesc: Create, edit, and delete tasks. Mark them as completed or pending with a single click.
home.featureCategoriesDesc: Organize your tasks with custom categories and colors for quick identification.
home.featureFiltersDesc: Find your tasks instantly with status filters, category filters, and real-time search.
home.stepsSubtitle: You only need three steps to organize your day.
home.step1Desc: Sign in with your email. If you don't have an account, we'll create one instantly.
home.step2Desc: Add tasks, assign categories, and describe what you need to do.
home.step3Desc: Filter, search, and mark your tasks as completed. Your productivity, organized.
home.ctaSubtitle: Start managing your tasks right now.
